ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., crime rate, zoning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the feature */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the feature */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the feature */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the feature details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the data model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the data model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the model details were updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_model_features" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data model */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature used in the data model */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Importance score of the feature in the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the feature importance was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
